de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class ImplicitFieldAdder

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.kit.Transformation
      • recoder.kit.TwoPassTransformation
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ImplicitFieldAdder

  • public class ImplicitFieldAdder
extends RecoderModelTransformer
    The Java DL requires some implicit fields and methods, that are available in each Java class. The name of the implicit fields/methods is usually enclosed between two angle brackets. To access them in a uniform way, they are added as usual fields to the classes, in particular this makes it possible to parse them in a natural way. The ImplicitFieldAdder is responsible to add all implicit fields to the type declarations of the model. As the implicit methods and only them will access these fields, this transformer has to be executed before the other transformers are called.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ImplicitFieldAdder

        public ImplicitFieldAdder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services,
                          RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
        creates a transformation that adds all implicit fields, for example <created>, <initialized> and <nextToCreate> etc.
        Parameters:
        services - the CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration to access model information
        cache - a cache object that stores information which is needed by and common to many transformations. it includes the compilation units, the declared classes, and information for local classes.

    • Method Detail

      • createImplicitRecoderField

        public static FieldDeclaration createImplicitRecoderField(String typeName,
                                                          String fieldName,
                                                          boolean isStatic,
                                                          boolean isPrivate)
        creates an implicit field of the given type and name
        Parameters:
        typeName - the name of the type of the new field to create
        fieldName - the name of the field
        isStatic - a boolean that is true if the field has to be created as static (class) field
        Returns:
        the new created field declaration

      • createImplicitRecoderField

        public static FieldDeclaration createImplicitRecoderField(String typeName,
                                                          String fieldName,
                                                          boolean isStatic,
                                                          boolean isPrivate,
                                                          boolean isFinal)

      • addGlobalImplicitRecoderFields

        private void addGlobalImplicitRecoderFields(TypeDeclaration td)
        The implicit fields divide up into two categories. Global fields declared just in java.lang.Object and type specific one declared in each reference type. This method adds the global ones.

      • addImplicitRecoderFields

        private void addImplicitRecoderFields(TypeDeclaration td)
        adds implicit fields to the given type declaration
        Parameters:
        td - the recoder.java.TypeDeclaration to be enriched with implicit fields

        protected void addClassInitializerStatusFields(TypeDeclaration td)

      • analyze

        public ProblemReport analyze()

        analyze in class TwoPassTransformation

      • makeExplicit

        protected void makeExplicit(TypeDeclaration td)
        Description copied from class: RecoderModelTransformer
        The method is called for each type declaration of the compilation unit and initiates the syntactical transformation. If you want to descend in inner classes you have to implement the recursion by yourself.
        Specified by:
        makeExplicit in class RecoderModelTransformer
